hero.subtitle: A smarter workforce time tracking platform that helps companies track employee work hours, manage attendance, and keep daily operations organized across teams and shifts.
hero.ratingText: Trusted for time tracking and workforce operations
hero.card1Text: Keep requests, balances, and manager decisions organized.
hero.card2Text: Turn approved work records into cleaner time summaries.
hero.card3Text: Simple shared check-ins for teams on site or branch floors.

section2.label: Online Time Tracking Software
section2.h2: Work Efficiently - Save Time and Costs
section2.h4: Easily track working hours, project hours and absences. Accurately, in real time, with only one click. Accessible anytime, anywhere via PC/Mac and smartphone or tablet.
section2.h3: Modular Time and Attendance System That Fits Your Needs
section2.note: Use Attendio as a complete time tracking system or use our products separately.
section2.p: We offer a comprehensive cloud-based time and attendance solution for employee time tracking, project time tracking, and leave management. You can choose to combine any of our modules so that your time tracking system is perfectly adjusted to your individual requirements. Due to the flexibility of our software, our time tracking solutions fit perfectly for companies of any size and any industry, no matter where they operate.

pricing.title:
Transparent.
Fair.

pricing.subtitle:
Try free for 60 days — no credit card, no commitment.
Then simply pick the plan that fits.

starter.name: Starter
starter.desc: For small teams that want to get started fast.

professional.name: Professional
professional.desc: The complete plan for growing businesses.

faqs.q: Do I need a credit card to start the trial?
faqs.a: No. You can use all features free for 60 days — no payment details needed. After that, you simply choose a plan.
Yes. Monthly plans can be cancelled monthly. Annual plans have a yearly term. No hidden fees.

faqs.q: Is Attendio GDPR and labour-law compliant?
faqs.a: Yes. All data is stored on European servers. The platform automatically enforces local labour law requirements and GDPR.

faqs.q: What if I have more than 50 employees?
faqs.a: Above 50 employees we recommend the Enterprise plan with unlimited licences and dedicated support. Just get in touch.

faqs.q: Which payment methods do you accept?
faqs.a: Credit card (Visa, Mastercard, Amex) and SEPA direct debit. Annual invoicing by bank transfer available on request.

pricing.bottomSub:
No credit card. No obligation.
Try all features free for 60 days.
